programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Closet Case
programme.desc: Being the cool dad that he is, Phil helps Haley convince Claire to allow Dylan to move in temporarily, but after seeing how intimate living together means, Phil is having major second thoughts.

programme.title: Modern Family: She Crazy
programme.desc: Phil is all in on project hatch-the-duck-eggs, even building a whole habitat for them. No one else is as enthused about this project and Lily is the only one suckered into helping him.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Verdict
programme.desc: Claire is excited to give Haley and Alex a great experience for 'Bring Your Daughter to Work Day' but the staff is not making it easy. Elsewhere, Phil takes Luke and Manny's class out for community service day.

programme.title: Modern Family: The More You Ignore Me
programme.desc: Claire and Phil have their hands full when Luke gets arrested for driving without a license, then they catch Alex sneaking out of a liquor store, but that’s on top of Phil dealing with some personal insecurities.

programme.title: Modern Family: Phil's Sexy, Sexy House
programme.desc: Everyone is at Jay and Gloria's for post-Thanksgiving leftovers brunch, and after a conversation about the sexy and sleek house that Phil is helping Mitch and Cam's friend sell, everyone gets the same bright idea to sneak in there and have a little 'fun.'

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean Out Your Junk Drawer
programme.desc: Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famed doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book 'Clean Out Your Junk Drawer' encourages people to get rid of all their emotional junk to become healthier people.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Skating By
programme.desc: Las Vegas chef Nicole Brisson rolls the dice against Chef Adam Greenberg for the chance to beat the house. It's up to "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell and TV host Jaymee Sire to play their cards and choose a contender.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ladies First
programme.desc: Chefs Natasha Pogrebinsky and Esther Choi are here to convince Marc Murphy and Katie Lee that they have what it takes.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Red Hot
programme.desc: A smokehouse master and a Californian take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Blast From The Past
programme.desc: Bobby Flay is haunted when Food Network's Amanda Freitag and Katie Lee bring two ghosts from his past to the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Touchdown!
programme.desc: Former football player, Deji Oduwole will meet competition junkie, Zane Holmquist. They'll have to beat each other before beating Bobby. Anne Burrell and Laila Ali take the judges chairs.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chop Chop
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag and Jet Tila are ready to compete, as they pit Italian chef Fabio Mura against Miami chef Nicole Votano. It's up to them to decide who has the chops to bring Bobby Flay down in his own kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Flirting with Victory
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli gets an assist from actress Malin Akerman, who proves to be more of a distraction than Bobby Flay can handle. Chefs Andrew Bent and Alejandro Barrientos try to steal a win while Malin runs interference in Bobby's kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Cheese Stands Alone
programme.desc: "The Kitchen's" Sunny Anderson and chef Giada De Laurentiis teams up again to bring the heat to Bobby Flay's kitchen. The dynamic duo has recruited Indian chef Paddy Rawal and Caribbean specialist chef Trey Lamont to set Bobby's kitchen ablaze.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Bogged Down in Buffalo
programme.desc: In Buffalo, single father Steven Marchione is struggling to keep the family's legacy restaurant Casa Di Francesca's open after a series of tragic life events. Robert Irvine has 48 hours to make Steven the leader his restaurant needs to save the business.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp: Three Dreams
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks connects with a chef in Connecticut who needs to branch out from wings and burgers, a Vermont chef in need of a confidence boost and a Long Beach, NY, restaurant owner suffering from a lack of cooking and restaurant experience.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Old Friends
programme.desc: Familiar faces return to the arena when restaurateurs and Beat Bobby Flay judges Michael Psilakis and Einat Admony compete to bring the heat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Family Matters
programme.desc: It's a family affair when father-and-son chefs Beto and Julian Rodarte battle it out to prove that the only thing stronger than family is their desire to beat Bobby Flay! Cookbook author Daphne Oz and model Jourdan Dunn judge.

programme.title: North America: No Place to Hide
programme.desc: A world of extreme storms and unpredictable blizzards, this land tests all those who set foot on it. From bunker-building prairie dogs to the fastest land animals on the continent, the fight to survive shapes all who dare call this place home.

programme.title: North America: Learn Young or Die
programme.desc: In the upper reaches of this vast continent, survival is a daily battle. From avalanche-dodging grizzlies to head-bashing bighorn sheep, from diving bears to cunning coyotes, witness the extremes and wonders of North America's mountains and forests.

programme.title: North America: The Savage Edge
programme.desc: The water's edge is America's final frontier, where human civilization and untameable wilderness collide. Witness the explosive collisions that define the continent's coasts, including a massive shark migration off of Miami's crowded beaches.

programme.title: North America: Outlaws and Skeletons
programme.desc: The desert is more alive than ever imagined as human and animals alike endure at the mercy of the elements. From Death Valley to the deserts of Mexico, creatures battle for survival with astounding adaptations.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Mayday Mayday
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens investigate a Jet Ski accident that sends an injured man to the hospital. The Wardens must track down a hunter shooting doves in a residential neighbourhood. On Lake Lewisville, Wardens deal with a partier who's had too much to drink.

programme.title: Black-ish: Colored Commentary

programme.desc: Dre campaigns to be the new Santa at the annual office Christmas party, but when that honour goes to Angelica, the lovely head of HR, he goes to great lengths to unseat her because he’s convinced Stevens and Lido need a black Santa.

programme.title: Black-ish: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: Dre thinks Rainbow is questioning his machismo after another man dismisses him in front of her, but when Pops swoops in to help his son save face, Ruby is attracted to his show of manliness and the couple reignite their love affair.

programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Big Night, Big Fight

programme.title: Movie: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: A teenage human-vampire hybrid trains at a special school to protect the Moroi: a line of peaceful, mortal vampires, of which her best friend is one. Aware of a growing threat within the Academy, the two plan to make their escape.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Past Tense

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Prime Mover

programme.desc: Following Citizen Z's on-air bounty announcement, it seems like everyone left who isn't a zombie is on the hunt for Murphy -- and they're not afraid to do whatever it takes to bring him in dead or alive.

programme.title: Z Nation: Zombie Road
programme.desc: A travelling caravan of desperate survivors is attacked by 'Blasters,' super fast zombies mutated by the radioactive fallout.

programme.title: Z Nation: Batch 47

programme.title: Z Nation: Zombaby!
programme.desc: Murphy's past actions come back to haunt him when a pregnant Serena tracks him down. Meanwhile, the survivors stumble across a hidden Mennonite farm where the members are battling not only zombies, but anthrax as well.

programme.title: Z Nation: Zombie Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Brand new baby daddy Murphy is falling in love with his precious baby girl, but the rest of the team is concerned there's more to Little Miss Murphy Jr. than meets the eye. Vasquez sneaks away for a secret meeting and Warren follows.

programme.title: Z Nation: Down the Mississippi
programme.desc: A boating accident foils an attempt to cross the Mississippi and splits the group up again. 10K is drawn into Sketchy and Skeezy’s latest scam, resulting in a run-in with Escorpion.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner in Garden Grove, California, about a house they want to quickly sell off the market. The house needs a lot of work, and has strange rooms everywhere that could spell disaster when trying to get permits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Mid-century Miss
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a midcentury house in La Habra, California, that is towards the top of a hill. The margin is tight on this home so they need to get in and out quickly to maximize profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Poolside Potential
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home in Whittier, California, oozing with summertime potential. Its large pool and hardscaped backyard have seen better days, but with the right touch, could become an entertainer's oasis once again.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Basement for the Band
programme.desc: A New Jersey rocker couple hopes to find a home that fits their lifestyle. While the night owls agree they want a master with few windows, she's looking for an older Colonial with lots of charm while he's got his heart set on an updated mid-century home.

programme.title: House Hunters: Kiwi Family Searches Seattle
programme.desc: After a few years in Minneapolis, a New Zealand native and his wife are moving their three kids, two dogs and a fish to Seattle for his new job. Reeling from real estate sticker shock, the couple has raised their initial budget to find a home.

programme.title: Hot Mess House: Small Space, Big Mess
programme.desc: A couple lives in a 350-square-foot apartment where a bedroom doubles as both a closet and home office with barely any space to move. They are busy working from home and raising young children and need to organize the chaos.

programme.title: Hot Mess House: Hot Mess to Less Stress
programme.desc: A couple that moved frequently their whole lives made it a habit to never fully unpack at each new home so when they needed an item they couldn't find, they just bought a new one. As a result, they've amassed a lot of things they don't need.

programme.title: Hot Mess House: Basement and Playroom Hot Mess
programme.desc: Jaeda lives in a house that lacks storage so the basement is a dumping ground for clothes, boxes and bins full of items she's forgotten she owns. Jason and Kelly have an overflowing playroom full of toys the kids have outgrown, but she can't let go.

programme.title: Hot Mess House: Hide the Clutter
programme.desc: Stephanie and Travis like to hide their mess which translates to stuffed cabinets and closets piled up to eye level with belongings. Meanwhile, Brandi and Tim are overwhelmed with how to even create order in their space.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: Got Bored and Bought a Farm
programme.desc: Jon Knight must preserve the history of a 280-year-old farmhouse while also making it feasible for modern living. When he learns that part of the foundation is beyond saving, he makes the shocking proposition to the owners to tear down half of the home.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: The Horse Farmhouse
programme.desc: Jon and Kristina take on their biggest renovation when they make over a couple's horse farm. They're tasked with combining all their clients' requests -- an old-world kitchen, a moody club room and a country club exterior -- into a single, cohesive home.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: Third Generation Renovation
programme.desc: A historical house from 1873 is transformed into a vibrant, modern home for a young family. Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin give this family of five a home with fun colors, shiny brass, whimsical bird wallpaper and even a beehive.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Bakeshop Kitchen
programme.desc: It's a sugary sweet renovation when Jon Knight and his team tackle a baker's 1910 home. Together, Jon and Kristina Crestin give her a charming, retro kitchen that any baker would love and a luxurious main suite the single mom truly deserves.

programme.title: Good Bones: Making Space in the Suburbs for a Large Family

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Raised from a calf by a young girl, Ferdinand is a massive bull whose physical size is rivalled only by the size of his heart. When the bovine is mistakenly thought to be an aggressive beast, he's captured and forced to fight against his will.

programme.title: Movie: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Viking Hiccup and his dragon's happy lives are disrupted when they meet a female Night Fury that's followed closely by an army determined to enslave all dragons. Hiccup's clan and their dragons set sail to find the safety of a legendary dragon utopia.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Lions
programme.desc: The lioness leader of a once mighty pride must now battle for their very survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: January-February: The Year Begins
programme.desc: As the Earth's axial tilt brings a scorching summer to some places and frigid winter to others, life must adapt to the extreme conditions.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: March-April: A Time of Renewal
programme.desc: As Spring is sprung cherry blossoms bloom across Japan and the final raft of green sea turtles arrive at the Great Barrier Reef to lay their eggs.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: May-June: A Time of Volatility
programme.desc: As the summer unfolds in the Northern Hemisphere some regions enter their wet season, and some go dry which creates a scarcity for some and bounty for others.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: July-August: A Time of Migration
programme.desc: With the Arctic ice sheets falling, and the summer melt beginning July brings dramatic natural shifts.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: September-October: A Time of Activation
programme.desc: As the Northern Hemisphere turns to autumn, Australia comes back to life and the mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical waters of Tonga.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A lifelong dream is within reach in the Arctic, and only Mother Nature stands in the way.

programme.desc: When investigators spot strange anomalies in the Amazon jungle, the discovery stokes rumors of a long-lost Nazi base in the Americas; experts follow the evidence to a grisly find, revealing a secret history of nuclear secrets and a notorious dictator.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Kalahari
programme.desc: Satellites spot strange spiral markings in the remote African desert. A weird deadly black blob is threatening the Florida Keys. Something massive found deep beneath the ice of Antarctica.

programme.desc: When footage reveals a man's leg taking on a life of its own, it appears that something alien is trying to burst free; cutting-edge science investigates what explains this strange and sinister possession, and what it takes to exorcise the invader inside.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of the Island Eater
programme.desc: Satellites capture evidence of a mysterious structure in a remote and rocky area of Hawaii, and when experts investigate, what they find could point to human sacrifices and the wrath of a shape-shifting god.

programme.title: Action Planet: Meeting The Climate Challenge
programme.desc: The multidimensional impact of our planet's rapidly changing climate presents issues of evolving complexity and environmental peril; explore the swift action and bold policies that now have the potential to confront the many challenges of climate change.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Mystery at Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.title: How It's Made: Super Robots
programme.desc: Discover how educational robots and boat radar mounts are constructed, and see how boxing belts are handcrafted.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: Crew-2
programme.desc: Follow live coverage of SpaceX and NASA as they launch Crew-2, sending a global team of astronauts to the ISS for critical research.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: Welcome to the ISS: Space Launch LIVE: Welcome to the ISS

programme.title: How It's Made: Super Robots
programme.desc: Discover how educational robots and boat radar mounts are constructed, and see how boxing belts are handcrafted.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Fire in the Cockpit
programme.desc: Some believe the fire on Apollo 1 that killed three astronauts was a top-secret cover-up, and a team of experts investigate if this disaster was a tragic accident or part of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: NASA Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of America's greatest achievements is also one of its most controversial, and now, a team of experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing, uncovering a secret report on hundreds of Nazis' involved in the Apollo space program.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: CIA's Secret Space War
programme.desc: Confidential CIA files reveal a top-secret war for space between the US and the Soviets, and a team of experts investigate if new discoveries about American espionage during the Apollo program provide evidence of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Killing Armstrong
programme.desc: Apollo 11's lunar module nearly killed Neil Armstrong during training, and some believe this close-call could explain a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. A team of experts investigate if dangers that the Apollo 11 crew faced were motive for a cover-up.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Conspiracy of the Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to hunt for the lost NASA tapes that recorded the Apollo 11 moon landing and shed light on a possible conspiracy, as some believe their disappearance is part of a cover-up to hide the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: The Hollywood Conspiracy
programme.desc: Some believe that the moon's waving American flag is the smoking gun that NASA faked the moon landing, and as a team of experts investigate this strange piece of evidence, the trail leads all the way to some of Hollywood's biggest names.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Death Wish
programme.desc: A park ranger in Texas pulls over a suspicious truck filled with marijuana. The passenger flees deep into the desert, unleashing a manhunt that will unearth something far more sinister--and bizarre--than detectives could ever have imagined.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Salon Stalker
programme.desc: When Idaho hairdresser Makaela Zabel-Gravatt begins cutting the hair of truck driver Christopher Wirfs, little does she realize that it signals the start of a two-year long nightmare that will end in the most heart-stopping and disturbing way.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder in the Mortuary
programme.desc: Julie Bowling stares down death every day as a cancer therapist and part-time funeral home worker. When she's killed while her husband is out of town, the focus turns to his secret life and shaky finances.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman is reported missing by her concerned husband after she fails to report to work. When her abandoned car is found, traces of blood in the trunk indicate more than just a disappearance -- it's clear she has been murdered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Backyard Blood
programme.desc: A man's dream comes true when he buys his parents' house and moves his family into it, only to discover that his neighbor on the other side of the fence holds a decades-long grudge against him that won't resolve until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: The Grim Sleeper: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: In 2001, LAPD's cold case unit reopened the files on a series of unsolved murders from the 1980s. DNA evidence lead them to one of the most ruthless serial killers -- The Grim Sleeper, who preyed on the women of South Central for decades.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Backyard Blood
programme.desc: A man's dream comes true when he buys his parents' house and moves his family into it, only to discover that his neighbor on the other side of the fence holds a decades-long grudge against him that won't resolve until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Kids

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Naval Affair
programme.desc: Fred and Jennifer have a picture perfect marriage. But when Fred meets Danielle, a young doctor in the Navy, Jennifer fights to keep Fred for herself. The love triangle explodes, leaving police struggling to understand a grisly crime scene.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: An Obsession
programme.desc: The crime scene of a double murder shows evidence of conflicting motives. An unlikely clue on the living room floor helps Detective Postiglione zero in on what really happened, leading to the arrest of an unassuming killer.

programme.title: To Catch a Killer: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: After a beloved florist is found dead inside his downtown shop, Granite City Police fear a killer may be on the loose. But how does this crafty criminal always manage to stay one step ahead? Detectives will go undercover to find out.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Silent Son
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Macin Smith doesn't come home from school, his parents worry is he in danger. A note hidden in his wallet leaves his family troubled. Police attempt to piece together the puzzle, while his family vacillates between hope and despair.

programme.title: Disappeared: A Family Man
programme.desc: Robert Hoagland fails to pick up his wife at the airport, and his son tells investigators his Dad ran in to some shady men days earlier.

programme.title: The Missing: Never Came Back
programme.desc: Tyler Davis goes out and is seen on surveillance walking across a hotel parking lot. Police ping his phone, but can't locate him. Later, Kristal Reisinger seeks spiritual enlightenment, but vanishes after heading to a drum circle.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Karma Comes Late
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered and dumped in an alley. Police have plenty of suspects, including her former beau, but the trail soon runs cold. Years later, a ghost from the past suddenly reappears, giving the family renewed hope for justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: After Midnight
programme.desc: A New Year's Eve party ends and a shot rings out. A young woman lies dead in her bedroom. Did she take her own life? Or did her husband kill her? Family members at war, a police department under fire, a husband on trial. What happened to Ashley Fallis?

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A young Iranian mom and wife lands the perfect job with a Portland insurance agency. But her charm and intellect make her the focus for several male co-workers. Corporate intrigue turns to cold-blooded murder when she's found dead, shot in the head.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Killer Beside Me
programme.desc: Weak, tired, confused, and deathly ill, Janet Overton, once the picture of health, eventually drops dead in her own driveway. This could be a case of illness, or maybe even cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Footsteps in the Snow
programme.desc: A young mother is found brutally murdered in her own home in Chestnut Ridge, New York. Clues outside the house have footprints leading in, but none leading out.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.desc: A whole other story is behind the roads and bridges that cross the United States. On this episode of America's Facts Vs. Fictions learn a woman was the driving force behind completing the Brooklyn Bridge and Route 66 wasn't built from scratch.

programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Zoot Suit Riots

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Last Trip to Cap Center
programme.desc: The Dawgs focus their attention on the exterior finishes of the Boulevard at the Capital Centre to complete their last round of salvaging in Largo, MD. Later, the team transforms a box of old farm equipment into a one-of-a-kind build.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Living Through Renovations on North Padre Island, Texas
programme.desc: Fallon and Mark Jennings are Texas natives with a big Texas family, and they're on the hunt for the perfect waterside home on North Padre Island.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fripp Island Fix-Up
programme.desc: Jim and Sarah are looking for a diamond in the rough on the hidden gem of Fripp Island, North Carolina. They find a property with an unparalleled oceanfront overlook.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Newlyweds Renovate Down the Shore
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jamie and Emily both grew up going to the Jersey Shore for family vacations. Now they're looking for a beachside bargain that they can renovate, but that might be tough to come by near the beaches of the Greater Atlantic City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mid-Atlantic
programme.desc: A Mid-Atlantic sampling of seafood, from crab cakes in Baltimore, to paella in Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Miami
programme.desc: We are headed to Miami for a little fun in the sun and some truly epic eats. We're trying it all, from stone crabs at Joe's, to the lamb shank at Sardinia. The piping hot oven at Fratelli La Bufala is turning out pillowy calzones.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: We're going after picture-perfect dishes that taste as good as they look.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Iowa State Fair
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares a tour of the Iowa State Fair, one of the largest and best known state fairs in the U.S. A gastronomic trip through the 445-acre fairgrounds reveals fresh, locally grown sweet corn, baked sausage cavatelli and Dutch letter pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Guayaquil
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the tropical and frenetic coastal cuisine of Guayaquil, Ecuador. Bright flavours and local ingredients define their gastronomy, and Andrew tries everything from red mangrove crab to a plantain dumpling studded with crispy pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bangkok: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thailand, has so many culinary treasures, it deserves a second trip! From steamed whole bass to massaman curry, Andrew highlights the city's exotic flavors and meals that are meant to be shared.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Las Vegas

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.desc: The Pugs go on a mission to find a bear so Chloe and the Lil' Nature Scouts get their wild animal badge. After a week of rain ends, Bingo and Rolly organize a game in the sun.

programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Split Personality/ Brain Drain
programme.desc: Candace accidentally gets hit by a 'splitter' ray which causes her to have two different personalities: Romantic Candace and Busting Candace. Then, Phineas and Ferb are sick with a cold, so they create a live television feed to their friends' homes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Unfair Science Fair / Unfair Science Fair Redux
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Valentine's Dance/ Green Streets
programme.desc: At the Valentine’s Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gabriella's Fella/ Cheap Show
programme.desc: When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Commando APP
programme.desc: On the Lab Rats' first day of school, all goes awry when Chase is confronted by a football player and his 'Commando App' is triggered, transforming him into an unruly drill sergeant.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Birthday Fail
programme.desc: Adam, Bree, and Chase, who have never had a birthday party of their own, get so caught up in throwing a surprise party for Leo that they forget to invite him to it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Can I Borrow the Helicopter?
programme.desc: After a few failed attempts at impressing Janelle, Leo borrows Davenport's high-speed helicopter to take her on a daring date. Meanwhile, Bree decides to move out of the lab and into her own room.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Night of the Living Virus
programme.desc: Leo accidentally releases a virus that transforms Eddy into a virtual demon.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo's Jam
programme.desc: When Leo needs help asking a girl to the school dance, Adam and Chase step in to help, but the plan backfires when she falls for the wrong brother. The boys decide to settle their differences on the dance floor and each show off their best moves.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Exoskeleton vs. Grandma
programme.desc: When Davenport's prized invention, a super strength and laser empowered exoskeleton suit, malfunctions, Leo takes it upon himself to fix it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Concert in a Can
programme.desc: The Lab Rats befriend a new kid in school named Marcus, who takes to the whole gang very quickly, except for Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Death Spiral Smackdown
programme.desc: Leo teams up with Adam in a school fitness challenge, hoping that Adam's bionic powers will be his secret weapon. But the plan backfires when they end up going head-to-head in the finals.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: The Jet-Black Sun! Vex Lucius!
Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.desc: Since completing the legendary 12 labours, Hercules has been living the life of a mercenary alongside six companions. When the King of Thrace enlists the band to help defeat a savage warlord, Hercules must once again use his strength for good to prevail.

programme.title: Movie: Thor: Ragnarok
programme.desc: Thor, separated from his legendary hammer, joins forces with old allies and enemies to confront Hela, the goddess of death, who threatens to destroy Asgard and usher in the disaster called Ragnarok. First, though, he'll have to best the Hulk in battle.

programme.title: Movie: Avengers: Infinity War
programme.desc: The Avengers and their friends join forces with the Guardians of the Galaxy when evil mastermind Thanos comes to Earth seeking the all-powerful Infinity Stones which he needs to fulfill his goal of wiping out half of the life in the universe.

programme.title: Movie: Demolition Man
programme.desc: A cryogenically frozen cop is revived in order to bring down his former arch nemesis.

programme.title: Movie: Deep Impact
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: Movie: Moneyball
programme.desc: The story of Billy Beane's attempt to put together a baseball team using computer generated analysis.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: Things Left to Do
programme.desc: A stand-off occurs between Virginia, her rangers and Morgan's group. Ginny has made a lot of enemies and it's finally catching up to her.

programme.title: Ride With Norman Reedus: Globetrotting On Two Wheels
programme.desc: From his travels, Norman Reedus has discovered it's the people who make the journey. He looks back on those he's met and the lessons he's learned throughout the world with guests Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Melissa McBride, Ryan Hurst and Milo Ventimiglia.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: Vampire death dealer Selene continues her struggle against the Lycans and Vampires that took everything from her. When she discovers the two factions are hunting her blood to become more powerful, she works to end the eternal war once and for all.

programme.title: Movie: Legion
programme.desc: After losing hope in humankind, God sends angels to bring on the Apocalypse. The only hope for humanity lies in the hands of a group of strangers stranded in a diner with the Archangel.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Slowly and in a Circular Fashion
programme.desc: When Walden's ex-wife and mother try to take control of his company, he tries to enlist Alan as an ally.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Possum on Chemo
programme.desc: Zoey tries to coerce Walden into cutting his hair and shaving. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey rekindle their relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Duchess of Dull-in-Sack
programme.desc: Walden tries to loosen Zoey up by sharing a couple of Berta's special brownies with her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sips, Sonnets and Sodomy
programme.desc: Strained relationships and a girl-fight result when a huge storm traps Walden, Alan, Zoey and Lyndsey in the house on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Not in My Mouth
programme.desc: Walden and Zoey's relationship suffers after a near-death experience. Meanwhile, Alan wonders if Lyndsey has a drinking problem.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The War Against Gingivitis
programme.desc: Things get tense in the Malibu house when Walden's estranged ex-business partner shows up looking to bury the hatchet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Palmdale, Ech
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey introduce their mothers to one another. Meanwhile, Jake and Eldridge ask Walden to drive them to a high school party.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Grandma's Pie
programme.desc: Walden breaks the news to Zoey that he is going into business with his ex-wife. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey try to come to terms with their moms' new relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Hose Says 'Yes'
programme.desc: Walden's commitment is tested when Zoey and her daughter come to live with him. Meanwhile, Alan gets more than he bargained for when in moves in with Lyndsey.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Why We Gave Up Women
programme.desc: When Alan suffers a minor heart attack, Charlie's ghost pays a visit to his hospital bedside.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Larceny and Old Lace
programme.desc: Sophia's latest boyfriend, Rocco, claims to have been involved in the mob. When the girls discover a bag of Rocco's with thousands of dollars in it, they assume he robbed a bank.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Rose's latest boyfriend has just retired and she is ready to spend a whole lot more time with him, but his retirement quickly turns him into a couch potato. Meanwhile, the girls deal with remodeling the garage into a guest room.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mister Terrific
programme.desc: Rose begins to date 'Mr. Terrific', a kiddie show host, who gets fired when Dorothy gets a part-time job as a consultant on the show, a job he helped her get.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mother's Day
programme.desc: While waiting for phone calls from their children wishing them a happy Mother's Day, the girls reminisce about past Mother's Days.

programme.title: Frasier: High Crane Drifter
programme.desc: A stressed Frasier resorts to physical force with a rude patron, which ends up being detailed in the local newspaper. He is hailed as a hero, but soon comes to regret it when the man decides to sue Frasier for assault.

programme.title: Frasier: Chess Pains
programme.desc: Frasier becomes obsessed with chess after Martin defeats him over and over again.

programme.title: Frasier: Crane vs. Crane
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier face off when they take opposite sides in a courtroom hearing over the issue of an elderly man's sanity. Niles believes he is crazy, but Frasier interprets the man's quirks as eccentricities.

programme.title: Frasier: Police Story
programme.desc: Frasier becomes enamoured with a traffic cop after she pulls him over for speeding.

programme.title: Frasier: Where There's Smoke There's Fired
programme.desc: The station owner's new manager, millionaire Big Willy, asks Frasier to get his fiancée to stop smoking. Frasier agrees, until he discovers that the fiancée is his agent, Bebe.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Loves Roz
programme.desc: When Roz decides to date one of Niles' patients, Frasier tries to find a way to warn Roz without breaching his ethical obligation for confidentiality. Roz soon mistakes his attempts to warn her for subtle declarations of yearning.

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group
programme.desc: Frasier is puzzled when a single member of a focus group dislikes his radio show. Frasier's quest to understand why becomes an obsession and he inadvertently ruins the man's life.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again
programme.desc: To celebrate Frasier's third anniversary at the radio station, Roz gives Frasier a copy of his first broadcast. As he listens, Frasier remembers the events that occurred when he first arrived in Seattle and reunited with his family.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bang the Drum, Stanley
programme.desc: Stan takes Dorothy and Sophia to a ballgame and asks them for a loan.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding
programme.desc: Sophia refuses to attend an old friend's funeral because her husband Max will be there.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding
programme.desc: When the newlyweds return from their honeymoon, they are anxious to find their own place.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brother, Can You Spare That Jacket
programme.desc: A chase ensues after Sophia gives away a jacket with a winning lottery ticket in it.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Blanche's brother, Clayton, comes to Miami for a visit, and Blanche goes all out fixing him up on blind dates. However, Rose learns the truth: Clayton is gay and is afraid to tell Blanche the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan Takes a Wife
programme.desc: Dorothy has second thoughts about Stan when he stands by her after Sophia falls ill.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Auction
programme.desc: The ladies plan to spend all of their savings to buy a dying artist's painting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blanche is troubled by her relationship with a blind man who likes her personality.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine
programme.desc: A woman fosters a retired military dog, while recovering from her broken engagement. When the dog's trainer returns home to claim his pup, she finds just what she looking for to mend her broken heart.

programme.title: Movie: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: A young widowed father that has an adolescent son helps him navigate love and discovers he has a lot to learn himself.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Every Weekend
programme.desc: Two people end up as guests at the same four weddings, four weekends in a row.

programme.title: Movie: Country at Heart
programme.desc: A struggling singer and a Nashville songwriter team up to write a hit song. As a romance blossoms, they find that they are inspired to do more than just write lyrics, they fall in love.

programme.title: The Office: WUPHF.com

programme.title: The Office: China
programme.desc: After reading an article about China being a global power, Michael decides they must be stopped before they can take over the U.S.

programme.title: The Office: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Michael waits for news about Holly and her boyfriend. Pam puts up a resolution board for everyone to post their New Year's resolutions.

programme.title: The Office: The Seminar
programme.desc: When Andy's sales are at his lowest ever, he gets desperate to hold a small business seminar.

programme.title: The Office: The Search
programme.desc: Jim gets an emergency phone call and is forced to leave Michael in the bathroom of a gas station. Holly, Erin and Dwight head out on a journey to find Michael.

programme.title: The Office: PDA
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Michael and Holly's public displays of affection make everyone uncomfortable. The aftermath of a bottomless champagne lunch causes complications for Jim and Pam.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Patrick's parents are in town for his surprise party but the parents end up with an even bigger surprise. Alexis drags Moira to a soap opera convention.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Roast
programme.desc: Johnny fills in for Moira at the annual Mayor's Roast as David distracts Moira from finding out that Stevie and Patrick have been taking private dance lessons.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Hike
programme.desc: Patrick tries to take David on a romantic hike while Johnny has a health scare that sends everyone into a panic.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Life Is a Cabaret
programme.desc: It's opening night for 'Cabaret', and Stevie is nowhere to be found. David tries to make a big announcement but keeps getting overshadowed by the musical.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Smoke Signals
programme.desc: David scouts a potential wedding venue, while Johnny and Moira have a romantic picnic by the creek.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Incident
programme.desc: David is embarrassed by a childhood issue that resurfaces, while Johnny, Stevie, and Roland attend a viewing for a motel nearby.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: The Property Brothers Do Magic
programme.desc: To find out how to put on a magic show, Phoebe has Property Brothers Jonathan and Drew Scott teach her how to perform card tricks and illusions.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: Tan France Does a Bake-Off
programme.desc: Phoebe challenges 'Queer Eye' host Tan France to a bake-off competition with guest judges Buddy Valastro of the show 'Cake Boss' and Christina Tosi of the bakery Milk Bar.

programme.title: South Park: Safe Space
programme.desc: Cartman is the latest victim of body shaming.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It

programme.title: South Park: Trapper Keeper
programme.desc: Cartman is elated to have a new, multi-functional Trapper Keeper, the Ultra Keeper Futura S2000. A mysterious stranger warns Cartman that, unless they destroy it, his Trapper Keeper will eventually take over the world and destroy humankind.

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go

programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette

programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: Movie: Pregnant at 17
programme.desc: A woman meets the 17-year-old girl her husband was having an affair with and discovers she is pregnant. She decides to help her out but when a dark figure from the girl's past returns, it puts all three of them in danger, including the baby.

programme.title: Movie: Stalked at 17
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl falls for a boy who promises to love her. After she gets pregnant, she starts to realize that he is deceptive and abusive. However, she can't leave since he threatens to kill her if she ever took his child away.

programme.title: Movie: Secrets of My Stepdaughter
programme.desc: A mother protects her stepdaughter after she witnesses the murder of her best friend, but is soon forced to come to grips with the terrifying possibility that her stepdaughter may be the real killer.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Tutor
programme.desc: When a star high school athlete needs help with his school work, a woman convinces his mother that she is the perfect tutor. However, she has other reasons that stem beyond helping him with his homework.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Left For Dead
programme.desc: Armed with DNA and a license plate from a particularly violent rape case, a detective thinks he has an easy case to crack. But neither provides a match. The case goes cold until the ground-breaking ‘Combined DNA Index System’ finds a hit years later.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murdered Bride
programme.desc: A case quickly goes cold for the LAPD in 1986 until 20 years later when DNA testing provides a new lead. The initial investigation searched for a male killer, but the DNA results reveal that they are looking for a woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: No Country for Gold Men
programme.desc: As the mid-summer Colorado heat bears down on the team, Jesse heads to Montana to salvage parts from the old washplant and Dave struggles to keep the operation together for another major gold haul.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Let There Be Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin calls in Freddy Dodge and Juan Ibarra to troubleshoot a faulty hopper. Then Freddy and Juan visit a floating wash plant that's losing gold in Alaska before rescuing a homemade operation in Arizona.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy Dodge's Mine Rescue: For Pete's Sake
programme.desc: Peter Freedman's sunk everything he has into building a mine with every gadget imaginable, but he's still not catching gold. Freddy and Juan make quick progress with their rescue but hit a wall until they discover a simple, fortune-changing fix.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: The Barehanded Killer

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: No Calm After the Storm

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Makani desperately pushes through the broiling valley to find a new tribe. Ryan hatches a high-risk plan to get a kill. Suzanne plots her exit from Seth, but Africa's heat thwarts her plan and forces a survivalist to leave the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Matter of Life or Seth

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Keep Your Frenemies Close
programme.desc: Wes scores another kill, but when a large group enters their camp, the win creates tension. A desperate Bulent migrates to Seth's watering hole. Seth is open to a partnership but Bulent remains solo and quickly gets a major food win in Seth's backyard.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Third Times the Harm

programme.title: Movie: Snitch

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Movie: The Heat
programme.desc: An ambitious FBI agent is sent to Boston to track down a drug lord. When she arrives, she is partnered with a loose cannon local cop who is not fond of her and is hell-bent on finding the criminal all on her own.

programme.title: Movie: The Heat
programme.desc: An ambitious FBI agent is sent to Boston to track down a drug lord. When she arrives, she is partnered with a loose cannon local cop who is not fond of her and is hell-bent on finding the criminal all on her own.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Fortune Feimster

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man
programme.desc: Molly Austin takes a bachelorette party to the next level, and Jonathan Martin's parents give new meaning to the word 'cheap'. Plus, if you thought your family was embarrassing, Rachel Feinstein's might have them beat.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stankin' Up the Joint
programme.desc: Someone has an odd prayer for Yamaneika, Matteo Lane has a hilarious blind date in Italy, and Ronnie Jordan has some tips for the single women at the office. Plus, Corey Rodrigues knows the importance of sunblock at the beach.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Grins and Giggles
programme.desc: Watch amateur science experiments go wrong. Plus, a road rage clip that will have you rolling.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Goofs and Gaffes
programme.desc: Features a salute to failed ice bucket challengers. Plus, watch what happens when a paranormal prank comes to life.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Big Time Blunders
programme.desc: Watch what happens when a very public marriage proposal backfires, find out whether cats are better than dogs and learn the best ways to improve your dating profile.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Surprises
programme.desc: Watch what happens when two guys pull $10,000 out of people's hair.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two government agents are brought together by the President to track down an evil genius.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
